message:
feat(tui): add InspectorTab::Diff/Budget variants and palette_state.open cleanup (1mfw3.3.1, 1mfw3.1.3)

Extend the inspector overlay with Diff and Budget tabs for cockpit evidence
rendering. Add rendering logic for both tabs showing diff strategy evidence
(spans, P(chg), costs) and budget controller state (degradation, PID, warmup).
Clean up palette_state.open references to use command_palette.is_visible()
as follow-up to the CommandPalette widget migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
